privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Natural Earth 110m admin countries dataset (https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip). The vector data contains 172 country features (after filtering ISO_A3 != '-99'). The join key field ISO_A3 is present. Required fields POP_EST and GDP_MD exist in the source data with verified spot check values: USA POP_EST = 328,239,523 (> 300M minimum), CHN POP_EST = 1,397,715,000 (> 1B minimum). All metadata claims about data sources, fields, and feature counts are accurate.
